issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing API keys or fetch failures.

scenarios.name: Scaffold a Chrome+Firefox extension with React popup and content script
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses npx wxt@latest init, entrypoints/popup + entrypoints/content.ts with defineContentScript and matches, and npm run dev/dev:firefox/zip per the skill; baseline hand-writes manifest.json and webpack/vite config, missing the file-based entrypoints and per-browser dev scripts.

scenarios.name: Persist an API key from popup and consume it in background fetch
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the WXT storage helper (storage.getItem/setItem with the local: prefix) in popup, defineBackground for the service worker, and browser.runtime.sendMessage for messaging as documented; baseline reaches for raw chrome.storage.local and chrome.runtime APIs without WXT's typed helpers.
